features: Dove Nutritive Solutions Intensive Repair Conditioner for women nourishes to repair and improve the appearance of damaged hair
Dove Intensive Repair Conditioner has been designed to strengthen and progressively nourish stressed out hair, and prevent future damage
This hair Conditioner is formulated with Nutri-Keratin Repair Actives, which work immediately to help repair the hair surface
This conditioner helps detangle hair, makes it feel smoother and improves manageability, giving both instant and progressive results with continuous use
This conditioner for dry damaged hair is suitable for daily use, so your hair looks healthy, strong and more beautiful every day
For best results, use with Dove Intensive Repair Shampoo to prevent breakage, and have instantly nourished, healthy-looking hair
description: Product Description Dove Intensive Repair Conditioner helps visually repair damaged hair, leaving it strong and healthy. To have healthy hair, repairing the damage is key. Dove Intensive Repair System gives your hair the daily dose of nourishment it needs. Our hair stands up to many things, from weather changes to different styling techniques. The Dove Intensive Repair Shampoo & Conditioner system, with keratin repair actives, nourishes hair in two ways. On the outside, it seals the hair cuticle, leaving it soft, smooth and shiny. Inside, keratin repair actives penetrate the hair to strengthen it deeply. Optimal for nourishing damaged hair, formulating with keratin repair actives, Dove Intensive Repair Conditioner restores visible damage to hair. So whether you comb with thermal heat or dye, the usual use of the conditioner will leave your hair strong and healthy. Daily use alongside our shampoo, Dove Intensive Repair Conditioner continues to optimize the condition of your hair over time. Each wash strengthens your hair from within. The last thing we want to do with fragile hair is to damage it even more. Our conditioner helps strengthen and maintain hair to prevent breakage from our daily routines. Ingredients Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Dimethiconol/Silsesquioxane Copolymer, Behentrimonium Chloride, Parfum, Glycerin, Hydrolyzed Soy Protein, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Sodium Gluconate, Dipropylene Glycol, Isohexadecane, Lactic Acid, 1,2-Hexanediol, Benzyl Alcohol, Citric Acid, Sodium Chloride, Disodium EDTA, Trideceth-6, Sodium Citrate, Cetrimonium Chloride, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Hexyl Cinnamal, Hydroxycitronellal, Linalool Directions 1. Apply Dove Intense Repair Conditioner after using the corresponding shampoo. 2. Leave on for a few minutes. 3. Rinse thoroughly. See more
